name: AI Law Firm Client Intake Router with Claude

parameters.content:
## AI Law Firm Client Intake Router with Claude

### How it works

This workflow serves a hosted client intake form, normalizes the prospective client's answers, and sends them to Claude to classify the practice area, judge urgency and statute-of-limitations risk, flag a possible conflict of interest, and decide whether the matter qualifies. Qualified intakes are logged to a Google Sheet and an alert is dispatched to the intake team, while declined or out-of-scope inquiries are logged separately for review. Every submitter receives a neutral confirmation page.

### Setup steps

- Open the Receive Intake Submission node and adjust the form title, description, and fields to match your firm's practice areas.
- Configure an HTTP Header Auth credential for Anthropic with header name x-api-key and value sk-ant-... and attach it to the Analyze Intake node.
- Connect Gmail credentials and set the intake-team recipient on the Dispatch Intake Alert node.
- Connect Google Sheets credentials and create a spreadsheet with two tabs, then replace the placeholder sheet ID in both append nodes.
- Review the qualification, urgency, and conflict rules in the Analyze Intake prompt and tune them to your firm.
- Activate the workflow and share the production form URL on your website or intake links.

### Customization

Edit the form fields and the Claude rubric to fit one practice area or many, change the qualification threshold, swap Gmail for Slack or Microsoft Teams, route different practice areas to different attorney inboxes, or push qualified intakes into a case-management system in parallel with the Google Sheets log.

## Receive and normalize intake

Serves a hosted intake form and standardizes the prospective client's contact details, matter type, incident date, and description for downstream processing.

## Classify and parse matter

Sends the normalized intake to Claude to determine practice area, urgency, statute-of-limitations risk, conflict flag, and qualification, then parses the JSON response and merges it back into the intake data.

## Route qualified intakes

Evaluates whether the matter qualifies, then routes the result: alerting the intake team and logging qualified matters, or logging declined and out-of-scope inquiries to a separate review tab.

## Confirm to submitter

Returns a neutral confirmation page to the prospective client after the routed handling path completes, with a disclaimer that no attorney-client relationship has been formed.

values.fieldLabel: Have You Already Hired an Attorney for This Matter?

parameters.formDescription: Tell us about your legal matter and our intake team will review it. Submitting this form does not create an attorney-client relationship.

assignments.name: priorAttorney
assignments.value: ={{ ($json['Have You Already Hired an Attorney for This Matter?'] || 'No').toString().trim() }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "claude-sonnet-4-6",
  "max_tokens": 1024,
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "You are an intake specialist at a multi-practice law firm. Analyze the prospective client's intake submission and reply with valid JSON only, no markdown fences, no commentary. Use this exact schema:

{
  "practice_area": "personal_injury|family|criminal|estate|business|employment|real_estate|other",
  "case_summary": "<one to two sentence neutral summary>",
  "qualified": <true or false>,
  "urgency": "high|medium|low",
  "time_sensitivity_note": "<short note on any deadline or statute of limitations risk, empty string if none>",
  "conflict_check_flag": <true or false>,
  "opposing_party": "<name of any opposing person or business mentioned, empty string otherwise>",
  "recommended_team": "<which practice group should handle this>",
  "decline_reason": "<short reason if qualified is false, empty string otherwise>",
  "missing_info": ["<key fact still needed>"]
}

Qualification rules:
- qualified is true when the matter plausibly fits a common legal practice area, there is enough detail to evaluate, and it is not spam, a sales pitch, or an unrelated request.
- qualified is false for spam, solicitations, vendor pitches, or matters where the person states they already have an attorney for this matter and are not seeking a second opinion.
Urgency rules:
- high: imminent deadline, statute of limitations risk, upcoming court or arrest date, or a safety issue.
- medium: standard matter with no immediate deadline.
- low: general question, informational, or low stakes.
Conflict rules: set conflict_check_flag to true whenever an opposing person, business, or organization is named so the firm can run a conflict check.

INTAKE SUBMISSION:
Matter type selected: " + {{ JSON.stringify($json.matterType) }} + "
Approximate date of incident: " + {{ JSON.stringify($json.incidentDate) }} + "
Already hired an attorney for this matter: " + {{ JSON.stringify($json.priorAttorney) }} + "
Name: " + {{ JSON.stringify($json.fullName) }} + "
Description: " + {{ JSON.stringify($json.situation) }}
    }
  ]
}

parameters.message:
=

New qualified intake

Practice area: {{ $json.practice_area }}
Urgency: {{ $json.urgency }}
Recommended team: {{ $json.recommended_team }}

{{ $json.time_sensitivity_note ? '

Time sensitivity: ' + $json.time_sensitivity_note + '

' : '' }} {{ $json.conflict_check_flag ? '

Run conflict check. Opposing party: ' + ($json.opposing_party || '(not named)') + '

' : '' }}

{{ $json.fullName }}
{{ $json.email }}{{ $json.phone ? ' · ' + $json.phone : '' }}
Preferred contact: {{ $json.preferredContact }}
Matter type selected: {{ $json.matterType }}
Approx. date of incident: {{ $json.incidentDate || '(not provided)' }}

Summary: {{ $json.case_summary }}

Their description:

{{ $json.situation }}

{{ $json.missing_info ? '

Still needed: ' + $json.missing_info + '

' : '' }}
parameters.subject: =New qualified intake: {{ $json.practice_area }} ({{ $json.urgency }}) - {{ $json.fullName }}

parameters.completionTitle: Thank you, we have your request
parameters.completionMessage: Our intake team will review your matter and reach out within one business day. Submitting this form does not create an attorney-client relationship, and please do not include confidential details until we have confirmed representation.
